name: The Longevity Agent
description: Supplement price comparison engine. Compare prices across trusted vendors, get per-serving costs, check drug interactions, and build checkout carts.

price_lookup.description: Look up supplement prices by ingredient. Each ingredient page has a price comparison table.

full_catalog.description: Complete product catalog with all prices, slugs, vendors, and per-serving costs.

cart_builder.description: Build a checkout cart by combining product slugs into a URL. The cart page shows grouped products by vendor with buy links.

parameters.vendor: Lock all items to one vendor slug (optional)

protocol_stacks.description: Pre-built supplement stacks from longevity researchers (Huberman, Attia, Johnson, etc.)

data_formats.html: All pages return HTML with structured data (Schema.org JSON-LD)

rate_limit: No rate limit. All pages are statically generated.
